instruction:
Express each ratio as a fraction in lowest terms. 1) 3 goals in 6 attempts: [ANS]
2) 11 quarters out of 55 coins: [ANS]
Express each rate as a unit rate. If the answer is in dollars and cents it must begin with a dollar sign (\$). 3) \$221 for 4 theater tickets: [ANS] (Price per ticket in dollars and cents) 4) 112.7 miles in 8.5 hours: [ANS] (Answer rounded to 2 decimal places)
